title: TV shortlist — 55–65″ · under 30,000 EGP · official manufacturers only

filtersApplied.sources: official manufacturer websites in Egypt only

shoppingRoute: Filter gallery to Main (55–65″ & under 30k) and prefer In stock
Start with Samsung / LG official stores for warranty clarity
Compare Elaraby (Tornado / Sharp / TCL) for local value and built-in receivers
Fresh 60″ is a rare mid-size official option under 30k
Ignore marketplace listings — this catalog is official manufacturers only
Re-check price and stock the day you buy — promos move weekly

kits.name: Value 55″ under 30k
kits.note: Best price-to-size among in-stock official listings

kits.name: 65″ official under 30k
kits.note: Samsung U8000H / LG NANO / Tornado-Sharp 65″ options

kits.name: Brand service priority
kits.note: Samsung or LG official store even if slightly higher
kits.rule: Prefer in-stock official cart over OOS cheaper listing

excludedExamples.name: TCL 4K Smart Frameless QD-Mini LED TV 55 Inch Built-In Receiver 55C6K

disclaimer: Scraped 2026-07-20 via Playwright from official manufacturer sites in Egypt only (Samsung.com/eg, LG.com/eg_en, Elaraby Group, Fresh.com.eg). Beko had no 55–65″ models; Haier listed models without EG e-commerce prices; Hisense Middle East site was unavailable. Prices and stock change — re-verify before purchase.
